description: Greenfield vocab rebrand: the always-present, path-derived local balls branch is now the **landing** (was **anchor**). Landing carries the dual metaphor cleanly — a landing pad for ground truth, and a porch you depart from down the trail (landing → step(s) → terminus). Spec bl-2e26 and task descriptions (bl-66e7, bl-be5f) already swept; this ball sweeps the only landed-code mention. 'satellite' was considered for the federated spoke and dropped (a spoke is just a remote); naming the convergence point (center/focus/hub) is deferred.
title: Vocab: rename anchor→landing in landed doc-comments [bl-2e26]
